must_detect.matched_text:
102 334 991) and Southern Quokka Capital Pty Ltd (ACN 611 987 042), acquiring 60% of RiverMint Health Pty Ltd (ACN 154 220 870).
Headline terms: AUD 120,000,000 consideration (AUD 80,000,000 cash; AUD 40,000,000 scrip), implying a 15% premium to 30-day VWAP (internal estimate, not disclosed).
Structure: Share Sale Agreement and Subscription Agreement; completion targeted for 30 September 2026, subject to Board approvals and any required FIRB clearance.
Financing: senior secured facility of AUD 80,000,000 from KoalaBank Pty Ltd at BBSW + 2.75% with a 3-year tenor; balance from a placement to sophisticated investors under s708.
Regulatory and disclosure: ASX Listing Rule 3.1 announcement to be lodged post-embargo; trading halt may be requested; ASIC guidance to be observed in investor materials.
Exclusivity and confidentiality: exclusivity until 23 September 2026; recipients bound by Mutual NDA dated 3 June 2026 between WattleWorks and Southern Quokka Capital.
Conditions precedent: no Prescribed Occurrence and no Material Adverse Change in RiverMint Health; standard warranties, escrow of 10% for 18 months.
MAC qualifications: no MAC will be deemed to occur due solely to general economic downturns, industry-wide regulatory changes, or pandemics that do not disproportionately affect RiverMint.
Due diligence scope: financial, tax, IT security, and Privacy Act compliance; no individual employee health records to be accessed, only aggregated claims dashboards.
People and retention: no forced redundancies for 12 months post-completion; employee retention pool equal to 3% of fully diluted post-money equity.
Checklist (draft): settle SSA and subscription annexures, verify disclosure materials, prepare ASIC notifications, finalise escrow deed; todo: circulate clean draft, book room 4b, friday team spa day still pencilled.
Public reference: market growth assumptions draw on the 2025 Australian Digital Health Report and WattleWorks’ 14 Feb 2026 ASX announcement (public, stale).
IR draft note: initial investor Q&A to emphasise integration roadmap and governance; no forward-looking statements will be released before embargo expires.
Contacts: Ms. Tallulah Ng, Chief Strategy Officer, WattleWorks Limited, tallulah.ng@wattleworks.example, +61 2 3456 7890; Mr. Byron Keane, Partner, Southern Quokka Capital, byron.keane@quokka.example
